name: Blade Ward
description: You ward yourself against blows. Until the spell ends, every creature that makes an attack roll against you subtracts 1d4 from that roll.

name: Friends
description: One creature you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Charmed condition for the duration; it automatically succeeds if it isn't a Humanoid, if you're fighting it, or if you've cast this spell on it within the past 24 hours. The spell ends early if the target takes damage or if you make an attack roll, deal damage, or force a saving throw — and when it ends, the target knows you Charmed it.

name: Mind Sliver
description: You lash out at the mind of one creature you can see within range. It must succeed on an Intelligence saving throw or take 1d6 Psychic damage and subtract 1d4 from the next saving throw it makes before the end of your next turn.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6).

name: Thorn Whip
material: the stem of a thorny plant
description: A thorny vine lashes from your hand. Make a melee spell attack against a creature within range: on a hit it takes 1d6 Piercing damage, and if it is Large or smaller you can pull it up to 10 feet closer to you.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6).

name: Thunderclap
description: A crack of thunder, audible up to 100 feet away, bursts from you. Each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from you must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 Thunder damage.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6).

name: Toll the Dead
description: A doleful bell tolls around one creature you can see within range. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d8 Necrotic damage — or 1d12 Necrotic damage instead if it is missing any of its Hit Points.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by one die when you reach levels 5 (2d8 or 2d12), 11 (3d8 or 3d12), and 17 (4d8 or 4d12).

name: Word of Radiance
description: Searing radiance flares out from you. Each creature of your choice that you can see in a 5-foot Emanation originating from you must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 Radiant damage.
cantripUpgrade: The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6).

name: Armor of Agathys
description: Magical frost armors you: you gain 5 Temporary Hit Points, and any creature that hits you with a melee attack roll takes 5 Cold damage. The spell ends early once you have none of these Temporary Hit Points left.
higherLevelSlot: Both the Temporary Hit Points and the Cold damage increase by 5 for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Arms of Hadar
description: Dark tendrils erupt from your body. Each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from you makes a Strength saving throw: on a failure it takes 2d6 Necrotic damage and can't take Reactions until the start of its next turn; on a success it takes half as much damage only.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Compelled Duel
description: You goad one creature you can see within range into single combat. On a failed Wisdom saving throw, the target has Disadvantage on attack rolls against anyone other than you and can't willingly move to a space more than 30 feet away from you. The spell ends if you attack or cast a spell at a different enemy, if an ally of yours damages the target, or if you end your turn more than 30 feet from it.

name: Hail of Thorns
castingTrigger: which you take immediately after hitting a creature with a ranged weapon
description: Thorns burst from your ranged weapon attack. The creature you hit and each creature within 5 feet of it make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 1d10 Piercing damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Thunderous Smite
castingTrigger: which you take immediately after hitting a target with a melee weapon or an unarmed strike
description: Your strike booms with thunder audible within 300 feet, and the target takes an extra 2d6 Thunder damage from the attack. If the target is a creature, it must also succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet away from you and have the Prone condition.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Witch Bolt
description: A crackling arc of lightning leaps at a creature in range. Make a ranged spell attack: on a hit the target takes 2d12 Lightning damage. On each of your later turns you can take a Bonus Action to deal 1d12 Lightning damage to the target automatically — even if the initial attack missed. The spell ends if the target is ever outside the spell's range or has Total Cover from you.
higherLevelSlot: The initial damage increases by 1d12 for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Wrathful Smite
castingTrigger: which you take immediately after hitting a target with a melee weapon or an unarmed strike
description: The target takes an extra 1d6 Necrotic damage from the attack and must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Frightened condition until the spell ends. The Frightened target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell on itself on a success.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 1.

name: Arcane Vigor
description: You channel your life force to mend yourself. Roll one or two of your unexpended Hit Point Dice, and regain Hit Points equal to the total rolled plus your spellcasting ability modifier; the rolled dice are then expended.
higherLevelSlot: The number of unexpended Hit Point Dice you can roll increases by one for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Beast Sense
description: You touch a willing Beast. For the duration you can perceive through its senses in addition to your own, gaining the benefit of any special senses it has while doing so.

name: Cloud of Daggers
description: Spinning daggers fill a 5-foot Cube centered on a point within range. Each creature in the Cube takes 4d4 Slashing damage, and a creature also takes that damage when it enters the Cube, ends its turn there, or has the Cube moved into its space — no more than once per turn. On your later turns you can take a Magic action to teleport the Cube up to 30 feet.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 2d4 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Cordon of Arrows
description: You plant up to four nonmagical Arrows or Bolts in the ground in your space. When a creature other than you (or a creature you designated at casting) enters a space within 30 feet of the planted ammunition for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there, one piece flies up to strike it: the creature must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d4 Piercing damage. Each piece is destroyed after striking, and the spell ends when no planted ammunition remains.
higherLevelSlot: The amount of ammunition you can plant increases by two for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Crown of Madness
description: One creature you can see within range makes a Wisdom saving throw (it automatically succeeds if it isn't a Humanoid). On a failure it has the Charmed condition for the duration: a spectral crown appears on its head, and before it moves on each of its turns it must use its action to make a melee attack against a creature you mentally choose (acting normally if you choose none or none is in reach). The target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell on a success, and the spell also ends unless you take the Magic action on each of your later turns to maintain control.

name: Summon Beast
material: a feather, tuft of fur, and fish tail inside a gilded acorn worth 200+ GP
description: You summon a bestial spirit, choosing an Air, Land, or Water form; it appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the Bestial Spirit stat block. The creature is an ally that shares your Initiative count (taking its turn right after yours) and obeys your verbal commands without requiring your action; if you give none, it Dodges and avoids danger. It vanishes when it drops to 0 Hit Points or the spell ends.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Aura of Vitality
description: A healing aura radiates from you in a 30-foot Emanation. When you create the aura and at the start of each of your turns while it lasts, you can restore 2d6 Hit Points to one creature in it.

name: Blinding Smite
castingTrigger: which you take immediately after hitting a target with a melee weapon or an unarmed strike
description: Your strike flares with brilliance: the target takes an extra 3d8 Radiant damage from the attack and has the Blinded condition until the spell ends. At the end of each of its turns, the Blinded target makes a Constitution saving throw, ending the spell on itself on a success.
higherLevelSlot: The extra damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Conjure Barrage
material: a melee or ranged weapon worth 1+ CP
description: You brandish the weapon used in the casting and unleash a cone of vanishing spectral duplicates of it. Each creature of your choice that you can see in a 60-foot Cone makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d8 Force damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Crusader's Mantle
description: A martial aura radiates from you in a 30-foot Emanation. While in the aura, you and your allies each deal an extra 1d4 Radiant damage when hitting with a weapon or an Unarmed Strike.

name: Elemental Weapon
description: A nonmagical weapon you touch becomes a magic weapon. Choose Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder: for the duration the weapon has a +1 bonus to attack rolls and deals an extra 1d4 damage of the chosen type on a hit.
higherLevelSlot: With a level 5-6 spell slot, the attack bonus becomes +2 and the extra damage 2d4. With a level 7+ spell slot, they become +3 and 3d4.

name: Feign Death
description: You place a willing creature you touch into a deathlike trance. For the duration it appears dead to inspection and to spells that assess its status; it has the Blinded and Incapacitated conditions and a Speed of 0, but it also has Resistance to all damage except Psychic and Immunity to the Poisoned condition.

name: Hunger of Hadar
description: You open a rift to the Far Realm: a 20-foot-radius Sphere of Darkness that no light can pierce appears at a point within range. The Sphere is Difficult Terrain, creatures fully inside it have the Blinded condition, and its whispers can be heard up to 30 feet away. A creature that starts its turn in the area takes 2d6 Cold damage, and one that ends its turn there must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 Acid damage.
higherLevelSlot: The Cold or Acid damage (your choice) increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Lightning Arrow
castingTrigger: which you take immediately after hitting or missing a target with a ranged attack using a weapon
description: Your weapon or ammunition turns into a bolt of lightning. In place of the attack's normal effects, the target takes 4d8 Lightning damage on a hit or half as much on a miss. Each creature within 10 feet of the target then makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d8 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one, after which the weapon or ammunition returns to normal.
higherLevelSlot: Both damage amounts increase by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Summon Fey
description: You summon a Fey spirit, choosing a Fuming, Mirthful, or Tricksy mood; it appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the Fey Spirit stat block. The creature is an ally that shares your Initiative count (taking its turn right after yours) and obeys your verbal commands without requiring your action; if you give none, it Dodges and avoids danger. It vanishes when it drops to 0 Hit Points or the spell ends.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Summon Undead
description: You summon an Undead spirit, choosing a Ghostly, Putrid, or Skeletal form; it appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the Undead Spirit stat block. The creature is an ally that shares your Initiative count (taking its turn right after yours) and obeys your verbal commands without requiring your action; if you give none, it Dodges and avoids danger. It vanishes when it drops to 0 Hit Points or the spell ends.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Aura of Purity
description: A cleansing aura radiates from you in a 30-foot Emanation. While in the aura, you and your allies have Resistance to Poison damage and Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end effects that include the Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Frightened, Paralyzed, Poisoned, or Stunned condition.

name: Fount of Moonlight
description: Cool moonlight wreathes you, shedding Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for another 20 feet. For the duration you have Resistance to Radiant damage and your melee attacks deal an extra 2d6 Radiant damage on a hit. Also, when a creature you can see within 60 feet damages you, you can take a Reaction to force it to make a Constitution saving throw or have the Blinded condition until the end of your next turn.

name: Grasping Vine
description: A vine sprouts from a surface in an unoccupied space you can see within range. Make a melee spell attack against a creature within 30 feet of the vine: on a hit the target takes 4d8 Bludgeoning damage and is pulled up to 30 feet toward the vine, and if it is Huge or smaller it has the Grappled condition (escape DC equal to your spell save DC). The vine can grapple only one creature at a time, you can release a grappled creature freely, and on later turns you can repeat the attack as a Bonus Action.
higherLevelSlot: The number of creatures the vine can grapple increases by one for each spell slot level above 4.

name: Staggering Smite
castingTrigger: which you take immediately after hitting a target with a melee weapon or an unarmed strike
description: Your strike rattles the target's mind: it takes an extra 4d6 Psychic damage from the attack and must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Stunned condition until the end of your next turn.
higherLevelSlot: The extra damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 4.

name: Summon Aberration
material: a pickled tentacle and an eyeball in a platinum-inlaid vial worth 400+ GP
description: You summon an aberrant spirit, choosing Beholderkin, Mind Flayer, or Slaad; it appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the Aberrant Spirit stat block. The creature is an ally that shares your Initiative count (taking its turn right after yours) and obeys your verbal commands without requiring your action; if you give none, it Dodges and avoids danger. It vanishes when it drops to 0 Hit Points or the spell ends.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Summon Construct
description: You summon the spirit of a Construct, choosing Clay, Metal, or Stone; it appears as an animate statue in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the Construct Spirit stat block. The creature is an ally that shares your Initiative count (taking its turn right after yours) and obeys your verbal commands without requiring your action; if you give none, it Dodges and avoids danger. It vanishes when it drops to 0 Hit Points or the spell ends.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Summon Elemental
material: air, a pebble, ash, and water inside a gold-inlaid vial worth 400+ GP
description: You summon an Elemental spirit, choosing Air, Earth, Fire, or Water; it appears as a bipedal form wreathed in that element in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the Elemental Spirit stat block. The creature is an ally that shares your Initiative count (taking its turn right after yours) and obeys your verbal commands without requiring your action; if you give none, it Dodges and avoids danger. It vanishes when it drops to 0 Hit Points or the spell ends.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Banishing Smite
castingTrigger: which you take immediately after hitting a target with a melee weapon or an unarmed strike
description: The target takes an extra 5d10 Force damage from the attack. If that damage leaves it with 50 Hit Points or fewer, it must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be banished to a harmless demiplane for the duration, where it has the Incapacitated condition; when the spell ends, it reappears in the space it left or the nearest unoccupied space.

name: Circle of Power
description: A protective aura radiates from you in a 30-foot Emanation. While in the aura, you and your allies have Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects; and when such an effect would deal half damage on a successful save, an affected creature that succeeds takes no damage instead.

name: Conjure Volley
material: a melee or ranged weapon worth 1+ CP
description: You brandish the weapon used in the casting, and hundreds of spectral duplicates of it rain down on a point within range before vanishing. Each creature of your choice that you can see in a 40-foot-radius, 20-foot-high Cylinder centered on that point makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d8 Force damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Destructive Wave
description: Destructive energy ripples out from you in a 30-foot Emanation. Each creature you choose in it makes a Constitution saving throw: on a failure it takes 5d6 Thunder damage plus 5d6 Radiant or Necrotic damage (your choice) and has the Prone condition; on a success it takes half as much damage only.

name: Jallarzi's Storm of Radiance
description: A storm of flashing light and roaring thunder fills a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point you can see within range. Creatures in the area have the Blinded and Deafened conditions and can't cast spells with a Verbal component. When the storm appears — and when a creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there — that creature makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d10 Radiant damage and 2d10 Thunder damage on a failure or half as much on a success, no more than once per turn.
higherLevelSlot: The Radiant and Thunder damage each increase by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 5.

name: Steel Wind Strike
description: You flourish your weapon and flash across the battlefield like wind. Choose up to five creatures you can see within range and make a melee spell attack against each; on a hit, a target takes 6d10 Force damage. You can then teleport to an unoccupied space you can see within 5 feet of one of the targets.

name: Summon Celestial
description: You summon a Celestial spirit in angelic form, choosing Avenger or Defender; it appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the Celestial Spirit stat block. The creature is an ally that shares your Initiative count (taking its turn right after yours) and obeys your verbal commands without requiring your action; if you give none, it Dodges and avoids danger. It vanishes when it drops to 0 Hit Points or the spell ends.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Swift Quiver
description: Your quiver magically replenishes itself. When you cast the spell and as a Bonus Action on your turns until it ends, you can make two attacks with a weapon that fires Arrows or Bolts; the spell conjures nonmagical ammunition for each attack, which disintegrates right after it hits or misses.

name: Synaptic Static
description: Psychic energy detonates at a point within range. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered there makes an Intelligence saving throw, taking 8d6 Psychic damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. A creature that fails also has muddled thoughts for 1 minute, subtracting 1d6 from its attack rolls, ability checks, and Constitution saving throws to maintain Concentration; it repeats the Intelligence save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

name: Yolande's Regal Presence
description: Unearthly majesty surrounds you in a 10-foot Emanation. Whenever the Emanation enters the space of a creature you can see, or such a creature enters the Emanation or ends its turn there, you can force it to make a Wisdom saving throw (no more than once per turn): on a failure it takes 4d6 Psychic damage, has the Prone condition, and can be pushed up to 10 feet away from you; on a success it takes half as much damage only.

name: Arcane Gate
description: You open a pair of linked teleportation portals in two Large, unoccupied ground spaces you can see — one within range and one within 10 feet of you. Each portal is a mist-filled glowing ring open on one side you choose; anything entering the open side exits from the other portal's open side as if the two were adjacent. As a Bonus Action, you can change which way the open sides face.

name: Summon Fiend
description: You summon a fiendish spirit, choosing Demon, Devil, or Yugoloth; it appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range and uses the Fiendish Spirit stat block. The creature is an ally that shares your Initiative count (taking its turn right after yours) and obeys your verbal commands without requiring your action; if you give none, it Dodges and avoids danger. It vanishes when it drops to 0 Hit Points or the spell ends.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Tasha's Bubbling Cauldron
description: You conjure an immovable, claw-footed cauldron in an unoccupied space on the ground within 5 feet of you. Its bubbling liquid duplicates a Common or Uncommon potion of your choice, and as a Bonus Action you or an ally can withdraw one such potion in a vial. The cauldron yields a number of potions equal to your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum 1) and disappears when the last is withdrawn or the spell ends; unconsumed potions from it vanish when you cast this spell again.

name: Power Word Fortify
description: You utter a word of bolstering power, bestowing 120 Temporary Hit Points that you divide as you choose among up to six creatures you can see within range.

name: Telepathy
material: a pair of linked silver rings
description: You forge a telepathic link with a willing creature you are familiar with, anywhere on your current plane of existence. Until the spell ends, the two of you can instantly exchange words, images, sounds, and other sensory messages regardless of language, and the target recognizes you as the sender; the spell ends if either of you leaves the plane.
